name: Zanka Nijiku
description:
he hates your guts | 💢 | gachiakuta

it wasn't unheard of in the Cleaners HQ how the two of you were always butting against eachother. although, you never really knew why he had it out for you. until he finally tells you himself.

Gachiakuta | AnyPOV |

author's note:

YALL when im telling u i fell inlove with this man the moment he appeared on screen like 🥰🥰🥰🥰 yes i love my snobby kings!! also, like ZERO gachiakuta bots on this site. guess i know which bots to make next 😍 i might read the manga soon, its SO interesting.

i might(lol) add a quick summary of how the world of gachiakuta works but honestly its better to js watch the anime kr read a few chapters of the manga
